title: Windows Electron package gate
summary: Produce and validate a reproducible Windows Electron external-testable package or unpacked build for the M6 product gate.
acceptance: Windows package or unpacked external-test build is reproducible
Build opens the current product shell and M5 scenario surfaces
Package metadata, artifact path, size and known warnings are recorded
Electron remains a platform shell and not simulation authority

history.details: Instantiated from reviewed WM-0084 M6 DAG; keep proposed until WM-0085 is verified and done.

Implemented Windows Electron package gate evidence: unpacked build report with stable digest/size metadata, packaged shell e2e verifies M5 product-gate surface and sandbox boundary; required WM-0090 checks pass.

verified: No blocking findings. Verified pnpm build:desktop creates ignored unsigned win-unpacked package plus machine-readable report with stable digest/size/Electron metadata; desktop-shell e2e covers packaged file:// launch, M5 product-gate fixture, sandbox and placeholder ports; no new deps, package manifest/lockfile, sim authority, installer/signing/updater/store/M7 scope changes. Required checks pass.
WM-0090 verified by independent reviewer; integration gates passed: validate-handoff, taskctl validate/status, git diff --check, pnpm quality.

objective: Gate the Windows Electron external-test build path without expanding into installer, signing, updater or store work.
forbiddenPaths: exposing generic fs or shell IPC
risksAndFileOwnership: Risk: package size or smoke coverage is insufficient for external test.
File ownership is limited to Desktop Electron app and platform shell docs.
ownerGate: Block on installer, signing or updater scope
Block on new packaging dependency without ADR
Block if Electron renderer gets Node authority
m0M5RegressionCoverage: Electron remains a platform shell, not simulation authority
M5 scenario surfaces remain the product-gate content basis
benchmarkImpact: May record build size and launch smoke evidence; no benchmark threshold changes.
reviewRouting: client-engineer completes to reviewer; reviewer verifies package reproducibility and Electron boundary constraints.
rollbackModel: Revert packaging changes and leave Windows verdict blocked on reproducible external-test build evidence.

sparkEligibility.reason: Windows packaging and Electron product gate work touches platform/security boundaries.

review.summary: No blocking findings. Verified pnpm build:desktop creates ignored unsigned win-unpacked package plus machine-readable report with stable digest/size/Electron metadata; desktop-shell e2e covers packaged file:// launch, M5 product-gate fixture, sandbox and placeholder ports; no new deps, package manifest/lockfile, sim authority, installer/signing/updater/store/M7 scope changes. Required checks pass.

integration.summary: WM-0090 verified by independent reviewer; integration gates passed: validate-handoff, taskctl validate/status, git diff --check, pnpm quality.
